lockedIdsAssessment.semanticDifference: lockedTaskIds (schema) = lock entire task (all its slots); lockedSlotIds (runtime) = lock individual slot positions. If a task has 3 slots and only 1 is in lockedSlotIds, only that 1 is locked — not the other 2. For multi-slot courses (e.g. 3-hour lab), this matters.
lockedIdsAssessment.recommendation: 下一阶段 K21-FIX-E 选项: (A) 保留双名 + 加 alias, 文档化差异; (B) 重命名 schema 字段 lockedTaskIds → lockedSlotIds (migration 简单, 风险中等); (C) 在 solver 层增加 task-level lock 解析 (if task has any locked slot, lock all its slots); 推荐: 阶段 1 选 A (compat), 阶段 2 选 C (task-level lock). 注意: schema 字段当前是 STRING (JSON), 不是 array, 改造需考虑 migration.

configSnapshotAssessment.reproducibilityRisk: 若调度 config 修改后, 旧 run 仍引用 configId, 但 config 内容已变. 当前 resultSnapshot 仅记录 lockedSlotIds + randomSeed + score, 不记录 maxIterations / lahcWindowSize. 历史 run 无法复现.

weightConfiguration.recommendWeightConfigStage: K21-FIX-I-SCORE-WEIGHTS-ROADMAP (后置, 因为 dynamic weights 需要 score.ts refactor + regression verify)

findings.title: SchedulingConfig 字段: model, id, name, semesterId, semester, maxIterations, lahcWindowSize, randomSeed, solverVersion, lockedSlotIds, lockedTaskIds, createdAt, updatedAt, runs. 缺失: hardWeights (HC1-HC5), softWeights (SC1-SC4), configSnapshot field (K21-FIX-G alignment: randomSeed/updatedAt/solverVersion/lockedSlotIds 已添加)
findings.currentStatus: DB 中有 1 条 config. Schema 字段: model, id, name, semesterId, semester, maxIterations, lahcWindowSize, randomSeed, solverVersion, lockedSlotIds, lockedTaskIds, createdAt, updatedAt, runs. K21-FIX-F 加: randomSeed=true, updatedAt=true, solverVersion=true, lockedSlotIds=true. 仍缺: hardWeights=false, softWeights=false, configSnapshot=false.
evidence: SchedulingConfig model fields: model, id, name, semesterId, semester, maxIterations, lahcWindowSize, randomSeed, solverVersion, lockedSlotIds, lockedTaskIds, createdAt, updatedAt, runs
K21-FIX-G alignment: 4 of 6 missing fields added by K21-FIX-F. Still 2 missing (hard/soft weights, deferred to K22).
findings.risk: Schema 缺 hardWeights, softWeights. randomSeed/updatedAt/solverVersion/lockedSlotIds 已由 K21-FIX-F 解决. 字段不足导致: 权重不可调 (后置到 K22).
findings.recommendation: 本阶段 (K21-FIX-G) 不实施. K22+ K21-FIX-I-SCORE-WEIGHTS-ROADMAP: hardWeights / softWeights JSON 字段 + score.ts refactor.

findings.title: solver 实际从 local SolverConfig 接口取参数, 不读 DB SchedulingConfig
findings.currentStatus: Local SolverConfig interface 字段: maxIterations, lahcWindowSize, lockedSlotIds, randomSeed. solver 直接读 SchedulingConfig: false (fields: none). preview.ts 读 SchedulingConfig: true (仅取 configId 外键), preview 传给 solver 的字段: maxIterations, lahcWindowSize, randomSeed, lockedSlotIds. solver 实际使用: maxIterations=true, lahcWindowSize=true, randomSeed=true, lockedSlotIds=true.
evidence: local SolverConfig fields: maxIterations, lahcWindowSize, lockedSlotIds, randomSeed
preview reads SchedulingConfig (for configId only): true
preview passes to solver: maxIterations, lahcWindowSize, randomSeed, lockedSlotIds
findings.risk: solver 完全依赖 local SolverConfig + API request body. SchedulingConfig 的 maxIterations/lahcWindowSize 字段被定义但从未被读, 用户也无法通过 config 选. 后果: 多个 config 记录无意义, 当前 DB 的 1 个 config 实际仅作 "外键占位".
findings.recommendation: 下一阶段: preview.ts 应解析 SchedulingConfig 字段: (a) 如果 request body 未提供 maxIterations/lahcWindowSize/lockedSlotIds, fallback 到 config 的字段; (b) 如果 request body 提供, 覆盖 config. 这样 config 才能真正生效.

findings.title: K21-FIX-G-AUDIT: preview/apply/rollback API + config CRUD + resultSnapshot.config 全部已实现. 降级为 NONE.
findings.currentStatus: K21-FIX-F delivered: preview API 接受 configId=true; config CRUD API=true (endpoints: src/app/api/admin/scheduler/configs/route.ts, src/app/api/admin/scheduler/configs/[id]/route.ts); resultSnapshot 含 solver config=true; apply 复用 previewRun.configId=true; rollback 复用 applyRun.configId=true. preview 验证 lockedSlotIds=true.
evidence: preview accepts: maxIterations=true, lahcWindowSize=true, randomSeed=true, lockedSlotIds=true, configId=true
apply API exists: true, accepts previewRunId=true, reuses config=true
rollback API exists: true, accepts applyRunId=true, reuses config=true
config CRUD API exists: true, endpoints: src/app/api/admin/scheduler/configs/route.ts, src/app/api/admin/scheduler/configs/[id]/route.ts
K21-FIX-G alignment: severity=NONE (K21-FIX-F delivered config CRUD + preview configId + resultSnapshot.config)
findings.risk: K21-FIX-F 已解决. 当前 API 链完整: config CRUD + preview 接受 configId/overrides + resultSnapshot.config 写入 + apply/rollback 复用 configId.
findings.recommendation: K21-FIX-G 无 action. 已正式关闭.

findings.title: K21-FIX-G-AUDIT: Schema 新增 lockedSlotIds 字段 (Option 2), lockedTaskIds 保留 deprecated. task-level lock 解析后置到 K22. 降级为 LOW.
findings.currentStatus: K21-FIX-F: SchedulingConfig.lockedSlotIds String? 已添加 (runtime/UI primary). lockedTaskIds 保留 deprecated (legacy task-id bag). runtime = lockedSlotIds. UI = lockedSlotIds. task-level lock parser (if task has any locked slot, all its slots locked) 仍未实施 — 后置 K22.
evidence: schema field: lockedTaskIds (String (JSON array of IDs))
schema field is used by solver: false
UI variable: lockedSlotIds (前端使用 slot ID)

semantic difference: lockedTaskIds (schema) = lock entire task (all its slots); lockedSlotIds (runtime) = lock individual slot positions. If a task has 3 slots and only 1 is in lockedSlotIds, only that 1 is locked — not the other 2. For multi-slot courses (e.g. 3-hour lab), this matters.

recommendation: 下一阶段 K21-FIX-E 选项: (A) 保留双名 + 加 alias, 文档化差异; (B) 重命名 schema 字段 lockedTaskIds → lockedSlotIds (migration 简单, 风险中等); (C) 在 solver 层增加 task-level lock 解析 (if task has any locked slot, lock all its slots); 推荐: 阶段 1 选 A (compat), 阶段 2 选 C (task-level lock). 注意: schema 字段当前是 STRING (JSON), 不是 array, 改造需考虑 migration.
K21-FIX-G alignment: lockedSlotIds schema field added; lockedTaskIds deprecated; task-level lock parser deferred to K22.
findings.risk: task-level lock 解析 (锁整门课) 仍未实施. 多 slot 课程 (e.g. 3 节连堂实验课) 用户锁 1 个 slot, 仍只锁 1 个, 其他 2 个可能被 solver 移动. 行为可解释但需文档化.
findings.recommendation: 后置到 K22: solver 层增加 task-level lock 解析. 文档化语义差异.

findings.title: K21-FIX-G-AUDIT: resultSnapshot.config (maxIterations/lahcWindowSize/randomSeed/lockedSlotIds/solverVersion/source) 已写入. databaseFingerprint=true 保留. 降级为 NONE.
findings.currentStatus: K21-FIX-F 实施后: SchedulingRun.resultSnapshot.config 含: configId, name, maxIterations, lahcWindowSize, randomSeed, lockedSlotIds, solverVersion, source, snapshotTakenAt. apply/rollback 复用 resultSnapshot.config. 旧 run 无 config 字段时 UI fallback 提示.
evidence: history changes impact prior runs: true
reproducibility risk: 若调度 config 修改后, 旧 run 仍引用 configId, 但 config 内容已变. 当前 resultSnapshot 仅记录 lockedSlotIds + randomSeed + score, 不记录 maxIterations / lahcWindowSize. 历史 run 无法复现.
K21-FIX-G alignment: severity=NONE (resultSnapshot.config present, fingerprint present, history-reproducibility solved)
findings.risk: K21-FIX-F 已解决. 历史 run 现在可在 resultSnapshot.config 中读取 maxIterations/lahcWindowSize/randomSeed/lockedSlotIds/solverVersion. 完全可复现.

findings.title: Hard penalty=-1000 (硬编码), Soft penalties={"SOFT_SC1_CROSS_BUILDING":-5,"SOFT_SC2_SAME_DAY":-10,"SOFT_SC3_EXTREME_TIME":-1,"SOFT_SC4_CROSS_CAMPUS":-5,"SOFT_MINIMUM_PERTURBATION":-2} 全部硬编码. 不支持配置.
findings.currentStatus: HARD_PENALTY=-1000 (hardcoded in score.ts). Soft penalties 全部 hardcoded: {"SOFT_SC1_CROSS_BUILDING":-5,"SOFT_SC2_SAME_DAY":-10,"SOFT_SC3_EXTREME_TIME":-1,"SOFT_SC4_CROSS_CAMPUS":-5,"SOFT_MINIMUM_PERTURBATION":-2}. score.ts 接收 dynamic weights: false. 可配置 via DB: false, via API: false, via UI: false.
evidence: recommend weight config stage: K21-FIX-I-SCORE-WEIGHTS-ROADMAP (后置, 因为 dynamic weights 需要 score.ts refactor + regression verify)
findings.risk: 不同高校对权重需求不同 (e.g. 工科院校可能更在意 SC3 极端时间, 文科不在意). 当前无法调整, 排课结果不可优化.
findings.recommendation: 本阶段不改 weight 配置 (deferred to K21-FIX-I-SCORE-WEIGHTS-ROADMAP). 短期: 仅暴露 LAHC params (maxIterations / lahcWindowSize / randomSeed / lockedSlotIds). 长期: score.ts refactor 接收 dynamic weights, 配 hardWeights / softWeights JSON 字段.

recommendedOptions.option: A. 短期: 先做 config CRUD API + UI 暴露 maxIterations/lahcWindowSize + resultSnapshot 加 config 字段
pros: 解 4 项 MEDIUM 优先级最高 (D, B, C, F)
用户能调 LAHC 参数, 不需改 score.ts
无 solver algorithm 改动风险
cons: 不解决 G 类别 weight 不可配置
config 字段需要新 schema migration

recommendedOptions.option: B. 中期: 加 weight 配置 (hardWeights / softWeights JSON) + score.ts refactor
pros: 为 soft constraint expansion 铺路
cons: 可能影响现有 23/31 PASS 测试

recommendedOptions.option: C. 命名修复: 改 schema lockedTaskIds → lockedSlotIds, 加 task-level lock 解析
pros: 命名一致, 维护更清晰
支持 task-level lock (粒度粗, 防止整门课被拆散)
cons: 破坏性变更, 需考虑 backward compat
当前 0 lockedTaskIds 数据, 风险低

recommendedOptions.option: D. 长线: 自动调度 → preview → apply → rollback 完整 polish (进度条, 多级 rollback, history copy-as-new-run)
cons: 不解决 config 产品化核心问题
需要更多 UI 改动

recommendedRoadmap.reason: B/C/D/F 类别都需要先有 config CRUD API. 当前 DB 1 条 config, 用户无法创建/修改. 是后续所有 config 产品化工作的前置.
recommendedRoadmap.scope: 只读 audit + 设计: (1) SchedulingConfig schema migration (加 randomSeed, updatedAt, hardWeights, softWeights, solverVersion, configSnapshot); (2) /api/admin/scheduler/configs GET/POST/PUT/DELETE 设计; (3) per-semester default config 设计; (4) request/response schema. 不实施.
recommendedRoadmap.outOfScope: 不实施 migration. 不实施 API. 不改 solver. 不改 UI.

recommendedRoadmap.reason: K21-FIX-E plan 完成后, 实施 config CRUD API + schema migration + solver 解析 config 字段.
recommendedRoadmap.scope: 实施: (1) migration 加 randomSeed, updatedAt, hardWeights (JSON), softWeights (JSON), solverVersion, configSnapshot; (2) GET/POST/PUT/DELETE /api/admin/scheduler/configs; (3) preview/apply/rollback 复用 config; (4) resultSnapshot 增 solver config 字段; (5) per-semester default config resolver. 不做 weight 配置.
recommendedRoadmap.outOfScope: 不改 score.ts. 不改 UI. 不实施 hard/soft weight UI.

recommendedRoadmap.reason: D 类别 MEDIUM. 用户无法 UI 调参. 当前 UI 只暴露 randomSeed + lockedSlotIds.
recommendedRoadmap.scope: 实施 UI: (1) maxIterations input (100-15000); (2) lahcWindowSize input (50-2000); (3) randomSeed input (已存在); (4) config picker (下拉选 semester-scoped config); (5) save/reset 按钮 (保存为新 config); (6) lockedSlotIds manager (已存在, 完善); (7) input validation.
recommendedRoadmap.outOfScope: 不做 hard/soft weight UI. 不做 weight config. 不改 solver.

recommendedRoadmap.reason: F 类别 MEDIUM. 当前 resultSnapshot 不含 maxIterations/lahcWindowSize. 历史 run 不可复现.
recommendedRoadmap.scope: 实施: (1) SchedulingRun.resultSnapshot 增 maxIterations/lahcWindowSize 字段; (2) 或新增 configSnapshot String 字段存完整 config JSON; (3) databaseFingerprint 保留; (4) history 比较 readiness.
recommendedRoadmap.outOfScope: 不改 solver algorithm. 不改 apply/rollback 流程.

recommendedRoadmap.reason: G 类别 MEDIUM. 7 项常见软约束未覆盖 + weight 不可配置. 后置, 因为 score.ts refactor 风险大.
recommendedRoadmap.scope: 只读 audit + 设计: (1) score.ts refactor 接收 dynamic weights; (2) hardWeights / softWeights JSON 字段; (3) regression verify plan; (4) 实施推迟到 K22+.
recommendedRoadmap.outOfScope: K21 不实施, K22 路线.

recommendedRoadmap.reason: E 类别 MEDIUM. lockedTaskIds / lockedSlotIds 命名不一致. 当前 0 lockedTaskIds 数据, migration 风险低.
recommendedRoadmap.scope: 实施: (1) 决策 task-level vs slot-level lock; (2) 推荐方案 C (task-level lock 解析); (3) migration rename lockedTaskIds → lockedSlotIds (optional, 当前数据为 0); (4) 文档化语义差异.
recommendedRoadmap.outOfScope: 不改 solver algorithm. 不改 preview API shape. 不改 UI label.

suggestedNextStage: K22-SCORE-WEIGHTS-ROADMAP (next, real remaining risk: hard/soft weights)
